heroPrompt:
Act as an elite frontend architect and creative director. Write a React component (Next.js/Tailwind CSS) for an immersive, cinematic hero section themed around Lane No. 5—a late-night street food hotspot in Pune. Use the exact visual and UX specs provided below:

1. VISUAL & COLOR SCHEME:
- Background: `#0F0F10` (Deep charcoal, Pune night sky).
- Accent Amber: `#FF9F0A` (Warm incandescent ember glow).
- Street Neon Orange: `#FF5E00` (High-intensity neon storefront warmth).
- Display Font: Sans-Serif Bold Condensed ('Archivo Black' or similar fallback via Tailwind uppercase tracking-tighter).
- Body/Utility Font: Monospace ('Space Mono' or 'SF Mono' tracking-wide).

2. LAYOUT & SCENOGRAPHY:
- Component must be full viewport height (`min-h-screen`) and relative positioned with a dark vignette overlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0F0F10] via-transparent to-[#0F0F10]/50`).
- Background Video: Autoplay, muted, loop, playsinline, optimized for modern codecs (WebM/H.265) with a static fallback image. The video features cinematic macro-cuts of sizzling shawarma spitting fat onto embers and steam curling off freshly poured Irani chai. Set video opacity to 0.45 for high contrast text readability.

3. INTERACTIVE HERO BADGE:
- Positioned at the top-left or centered above the main display header.
- Text: 'LIVE: SERVING UNTIL 3:00 AM'.
- Style: High-intensity `#FF5E00` outline/text with a CSS keyframe-pulsed shadow glow mimicking a flickering street neon sign. Include a small green/orange pulsing status indicator dot next to the text that dynamically calculates if the current Indian Standard Time (IST) is between 6:00 PM and 3:00 AM.

4. COPYWRITING & IMPACT TYPOGRAPHY:
- Main Title: 'SIZZLE. STEAM. LATE-NIGHT PUNE.' rendered in massive uppercase bold condensed display font with custom line-height (`leading-none`).
- Secondary Tagline: 'Lane No. 5 Energy. Raw, honest, street-side comfort built for post-midnight cravings.' in monospace clean body text.

5. PRIMARY CALL TO ACTION (CTA):
- An interactive multi-option button group labeled: 'DINE-IN / DRIVE-THROUGH / DELIVERY'.
- Button Style: Sharp industrial borders, utilizing monospace typography, with a hover transition that scales up slightly and flashes an incandescent `#FF9F0A` solid background color, casting a dynamic drop shadow of `#FF5E00` beneath.
- Clicking the button must trigger an elegant overlay modal with 3 action cards: Map directions to Sanjay Park/Airport Road, custom delivery options integrated to external delivery platforms, and drive-through route optimization.

6. CODE REQUIREMENTS:
- Fully responsive layout ensuring mobile layouts compress display headings smoothly (`text-5xl md:text-8xl`).
- Write pure React using Tailwind CSS utility classes. Avoid heavy external libraries except for Lucide Icons for iconography. Ensure code is ready to drop directly into Next.js/React environments with no missing dependencies or unhandled state.
landingPagePrompt:
Act as a senior frontend architect and cinematic UX strategist. Write the React-based page scaffolding (Next.js & Tailwind CSS) for the 'Lane No. 5' late-night sanctuary portal. Construct the entire landing page layout containing the following sequential sections:

1. CONTAINER & THEME SETUP:
- Parent wrapper setting background color to `#0F0F10` (Deep Charcoal) and body text color to `#F3F4F6` (Muted Warm White).
- Headings styled using high-impact Sans-Serif Bold Condensed typography; details and functional elements styled in Monospace.

2. INTERACTIVE SECTION 1: 'THE CORE ROTATION' (Street-Side Fuel)
- Title: 'THE CORE ROTATION' with subtitle 'No massive menu books. Just high-velocity, high-satisfaction street-side staples done right.'
- UI Mechanism: A horizontal, drag-scrollable/swipeable flex-row card container (`flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-streetNeonOrange`).
- Create exactly four high-contrast structural cards corresponding to the physical menu:
  a) SHAWARMA: 'Juicy chicken roasted slow, seasoned sharp, wrapped tight. Raw street food built for hunger.'
  b) IRANI CHAI: 'Sweet, strong, steaming hot. The definitive Pune midnight reset button.'
  c) BUN MASKA: 'Thick-cut toasted buns, loaded with rich Amul butter. Simple, legendary.'
  d) PERI PERI SHAWARMA: 'The rotisserie classic, kicked wide open with high-heat peri peri dust.'
- Card Design: Tall aspect ratio (`aspect-[3/4]`), crisp borders, `#0F0F10` base, macro placeholder photography background with dark overlay, dynamic text anchored at the bottom in monospace.

3. INTERACTIVE SECTION 2: 'LANE NO. 5 ENERGY' (Operational Pulse)
- Layout: A dynamic CSS Grid with a rugged, high-contrast, industrial blueprint look (`grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6`).
- Cell A (Social Proof): Real-time customer reviews and visual snapshots representing midnight crowds. Designed like a receipt slip utilizing monospace elements.
- Cell B (Live Heatmap): A stylized visual chart showing 'Peak Midnight Hours' (highlighting the spike between 11 PM and 2 AM) using colored progress bars styled in Accent Amber (`#FF9F0A`).
- Cell C (Interactive Map Card): Centered on Sanjay Park / Airport Road intersection. Renders a stylized vector outline map (using customized dark Leaflet / Mapbox or mock vector artwork) featuring a pulsing locator beacon at the center representing the storefront.

4. UTILITARIAN DASHBOARD FOOTER:
- Designed as an ultra-functional dashboard utilizing Monospace Street Clean typography.
- Left Column: Operating hours ('CLOSETIME: 3:00 AM IST') and Contact Hotline ('TEL: 085510 61614').
- Middle Column: Physical coordinates ('18.5630° N, 73.9076° E - Sanjay Park / Lane No. 5 Corner').
- Right Column: Immediate action button 'QUICK ROUTE FOR DRIVE-THROUGH' styled as a solid neon amber pill shape that integrates with Geolocation API to request directions. Keep it modular and pristine.
animationPrompt:
Act as an elite frontend motion developer and creative interaction director. Build a complete motion animation script and integration guide using Framer Motion (or GSAP) for the 'Lane No. 5' late-night sanctuary site. Your component must integrate the following micro-interactions and transitions directly into the React/Tailwind codebase:

1. LATE-NIGHT MODE TOGGLE (Ambient Luminescence Control):
- Implement a React State-controlled floating toggle switch labeled 'LATE-NIGHT MODE'.
- When toggled 'ON': Trigger a page-wide transition. Background shifts from raw charcoal to a pitch-black vignette overlay (`#060607`). Ambient light intensity dims. Content elements emit an outer box-shadow glow using the street neon orange (`#FF5E00`) and incandescent amber (`#FF9F0A`) hex values.
- When toggled 'OFF': Transition back to standard warm ambient night states smoothly over a duration of `600ms` with an `ease-in-out-sine` curve.

2. THE STEAM EFFECT (Chai Panel Micro-Interaction):
- Create a reusable React motion wrapper (`<SteamWrapper />`) that generates real-time curling steam visual effects behind or on top of targeted images when a user hovers over the Irani Chai menu card.
- Implementation: Use a dynamic overlay containing three SVG path elements styled with thin, semi-transparent white-to-transparent linear gradients. Animate these paths using SVG motion loops to translate vertically upward while oscillating horizontally (sinusoidal pathing), simultaneously fading out to 0 opacity at the top. Animation loop must feel completely organic and fluid.

3. THE SHAWARMA SIZZLE & GLOW EFFECT:
- Write a custom hover effect for the Shawarma cards. On cursor enter, the border of the card must shift from its static dark-gray outline to a glowing incandescent amber shadow (`box-shadow: 0 0 20px #FF9F0A`).
- Concurrently, fire a CSS-based particle emitter representing tiny glowing orange sparks/embers rising from the bottom edge of the card, fading out quickly.

4. FAST TURNAROUND SCROLL CHOREOGRAPHY:
- Structure page transitions using scroll triggers. As the user scrolls past the hero section, avoid slow sluggish eases. Implement slick, split-second cuts (`250ms - 350ms` using `ease-in-out-cubic`) that snap sections into focus.
- Navigating the menu list should snap content to center dynamically, replicating high-volume operational speed. Deliver pristine, production-ready, fully animated React code with inline configurations for GSAP or Framer Motion.
